name: io.github.5dive-ai/5dive-mcp
description: Expose the 5dive agent-fleet CLI (tasks, agents, digest) as stdio MCP tools.

environmentVariables.name: FIVEDIVE_SUDO
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to prefix CLI calls with sudo (managed 5dive boxes need root).

environmentVariables.name: FIVEDIVE_BIN
environmentVariables.description: Path to the 5dive binary (default: 5dive on PATH).
